title: Janhit Mein Jaari
subTitle: With the will to break taboo as her armour of choice, Mannu embarks to work as a condom salesperson, despite the reservations of her family and society.

title: Bhoot Returns
subTitle: Tarun and Namrata move into a luxurious bungalow with Taman and Nimmi, their son and daughter respectively. However, strange occurrences start taking place and they must escape in order to survive.

title: The Last Color
subTitle: Choti, a young tightrope walker, wishes to pursue her education but struggles to make a living. She soon befriends Noor, a widow who yearns to play Holi but is forced to live a life of abstinence.

title: Boom
subTitle: Three clueless models bumble their way into the Bombay underworld after hilariously botching a diamond smuggling deal to the Middle East.

title: Aatma: Feel It Around You
subTitle: After losing the custody of his daughter Nia to his wife, Maya, Abhay dies in a car accident. However, his spirit continues to haunt their happy and peaceful life.

title: Omerta
subTitle: Ahmed Omar Saeed Sheikh, a British terrorist of Pakistani descent, plots the kidnapping and murder of Wall Street Journal journalist Daniel Pearl.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: The host showcases the features of a variety of products manufactured by renowned brands that can be purchased from the comfort of one's home.

title: Kya Kool Hain Hum 3
subTitle: A man, kicked out of his house, begins to work as an adult film actor in Thailand. However, things take a turn when he falls in love with a girl from a conservative family.

title: Love Yatri - A Journey of Love
subTitle: Sushrut falls head over heels for Michelle at a festival in India. When she heads home, he follows her, and his heart, all the way to London.

title: Om Jai Jagdish
subTitle: Divided by ideologies, yet bound by love, three brothers end up going their separate ways. Fate offers them another chance to be together when their family home is on the brink of foreclosure.

title: 1920 London
subTitle: When black magic pushes Veer Singh to the verge of death, his wife Shivangi must turn to a saviour who might be connected to the situation in ways she can never imagine.

title: Mission Raniganj: The Great Bharat Rescue
subTitle: Mission Raniganj - 2023 - Mining engineer Jaswant Singh Gill leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

title: Kasoor
subTitle: When Shekhar is accused of killing his wife, he hires Simran, a lawyer with a spotless record. She believes he is innocent and starts developing feelings for him, unaware of his true intentions.

title: Kasoor
subTitle: When Shekhar is accused of killing his wife, he hires Simran, a lawyer with a spotless record. She believes he is innocent and starts developing feelings for him, unaware of his true intentions.

title: Saaya
subTitle: When a photographer who practises black magic tries to force himself on a policeman's wife, she kills him in self defence. But, the photographer's ghost stays around to haunt her and her family.

title: Kanjoos Makhichoos
subTitle: A man covertly saves money to fulfil his father's desire to go on the Char Dham Yatra. However, things change when his parents go missing due to heavy floods.

title: Love Express
subTitle: Kanav and Ashmeet's parents fix their wedding. However, he learns that she is interested in another man, whom her parents disapprove of, and decides to help them unite.

title: The Last Color
subTitle: Choti, a young tightrope walker, wishes to pursue her education but struggles to make a living. She soon befriends Noor, a widow who yearns to play Holi but is forced to live a life of abstinence.

title: Jawaani Jaaneman
subTitle: Jazz, a 40-year-old man, leads a frivolous casanova lifestyle in London. However, when Tia, a young woman claiming to be his daughter, enters his life, he decides to mend his ways.

title: Jodi No. 1
subTitle: Two friends, Jai and Veeru hatch a clever plot to deceive Rai Bahadur and rob him. However, their plans take an unexpected turn when they fall in love with Rai Bahadur's daughters.

title: Ek Vivah Aisa Bhi
subTitle: A tragedy compels Chandni to put off her marriage and singing career. As she takes on new responsibilities, Prem holds their love in his heart for years, and waits for the day when she can come back to him.

title: Auron Mein Kahan Dum Tha
subTitle: As Krishna, an incarcerated man, faces early release, his love story with Vasudha from more than twenty years ago unfurls.

title: Vedaa
subTitle: Vedaa, a victim of caste discrimination, trains as a boxer under Abhimanyu and strives to seek justice for the murder of her siblings.

title: Oh, My God!!
subTitle: A man sets his sights on getting others to invest in a savings scheme.

title: Oh, My God!!
subTitle: A man sets his sights on getting others to invest in a savings scheme.

title: Milenge Milenge
subTitle: Priya believes she has met her destined lover when she meets and falls in love with Amit, but they soon part ways due to differences. Fate, however, perpetually conspires to bring them back together.

title: Qarib Qarib Singlle
subTitle: Jaya and Yogi, two contrasting personalities, set out to retrace past relationships, sparking the most eventful trip of their lives.

title: Vicky Donor
subTitle: Vicky, a lively young man, works as a sperm donor for Dr Baldev Chaddha and proves to be highly successful. Consequently, Baldev's clinic thrives with the help of Vicky's contributions.

title: Sapne Suhane Ladakpan Ke
subTitle: In fulfilment of her mother's dying wish, Gunjan, a spirited teenager, is sent to live with her aunt. As she gradually adjusts to her new life, she finds solace in her shy cousin, Rachna.

title: Ek Mahanayak: Dr. B. R. Ambedkar
subTitle: Preyed upon due to socio-economic discrimination, Bhimrao Ramji Ambedkar, a young boy from a poor family, strives for basic human rights and equality for all.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Bhor Bhakti Songs
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of melodious songs sung and composed by talented artists is played in order to invoke the spirit of devotion.

title: Santoshi Maa
subTitle: As Santoshi starts working in the house, Raghu warns her discreetly. Poulomi Devi's initial attempt to provoke Santoshi fails, prompting her to disguise herself and confront Santoshi in a different form.

title: Shoorveer Sister
subTitle: A princess has seven brothers who are stuck in the form of flowers, as she strives to remove the curse and give their lives back to them.

title: Zee Cine Awards 2026
subTitle: An awards night to honor the best talent from Indian film industry for their contribution to Indian cinema, and recognizing notable performers of 2013.

title: Doli Armaanon Ki
subTitle: Urmi's silent refusal wounds Samrat's ego, prompting him to hunt for the truth.

title: Pavitra Rishta
subTitle: Manav, a humble mechanic, is deeply in love with Archana, a hardworking middle-class girl. They marry, but their happiness is soon overshadowed by a series of crises within their family.

subTitle: Radhika, an ardent devotee of Lord Krishna, often seeks refuge in the Almighty. Soon, she meets the love of her life, Dev and the two face several obstacles in their relationship.

subTitle: Raina discovers an enchanted book to defeat the Brahmrakshas. Afterwards, Rishabh and Raina admit their feelings for one another, and Naina trails Yug to the market in the village.
